Bash(python3 -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect('.deciduous/deciduous.db')
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('SELECT id, title, status FROM nodes ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10')
for row in cur.fetchall():
    print(f'{row[\"id\"]}: {row[\"title\"]} [{row[\"status\"]}]')
conn.close()
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect('.deciduous/deciduous.db')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\")
for row in cur.fetchall():
    print(row[0])
conn.close()
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect('.deciduous/deciduous.db')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('SELECT id, title, status FROM decision_nodes ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10')
for row in cur.fetchall():
    print(f'{row[0]}: {row[1]} [{row[2]}]')
conn.close()
")

Bash(nix eval --expr 'let pkgs = import <nixpkgs> {}; in builtins.attrNames (pkgs.lib.filterAttrs (n: _: true) (builtins.intersectAttrs pkgs.llvmPackages_19 pkgs))' 2)
Bash(nix-instantiate --eval --expr 'let pkgs = import <nixpkgs> {}; in builtins.filter (n: builtins.match "llvmPackages_.*" n != null) (builtins.attrNames pkgs)' 2)
